title: Platform Creation
wikitext:
[[File:MRe0kyR.png|thumb|400px|[[Sayaka Miki]] creates a platform in a fight against a witch.]]

==Summary==
'''Platform Creation''', as the name suggests, is the ability to create a platform in the middle of the air to step on. It functions similar to [[Forcefield Creation]], only for agility rather than defense (Though some can be defensive). They are often visually composed of several symbols, ranging from ancient texts for magical verses to more modern symbols, but can also just be anything you can stand on.

==Possible Uses==
* As a pedestal, or an extra step.
* Keeping an enemy below oneself.
* Keeping up with [[Flight]] users or significantly [[Large Size|Large Sized]] enemies.

==Limitations==
* Generally cannot be used for defensive purposes.

==Users==
*[[Arcanaloth]] ([[Dungeons and Dragons]])
*[[Rundelhaus Code]] ([[Log Horizon]])
*[[Seraphina (Disgaea)|Seraphina]] ([[Nipponverse|Disgaea]])
*[[Arthur Watts]] ([[RWBY]])
*[[Pegasus (Miraculous Ladybug)|Pegasus]] ([[Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir]])
